THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.CASE SETTLED PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,345.00 FILED BY CRAVENS, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRAVENS, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-18-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AARON CRAVENS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID JENKINS (COMMUNITY MANAGER). PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. A RENT CREDIT OF $765.15 DEDUCTED FROM DECEMBER'S RENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JANUARY 18TH HEARING IF NO DEDUCTION TO RENT HAS OCCURED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
